title: Rich Text Blocks Demo
summary: Fixture page with rich text blocks for the v2 editor.

content.text: This fixture page includes rich text blocks so the v2 insert menu has something real to work with.

body.title: Try inserting another block
body.text: Use the insert menu to add more blocks between text fragments.

content.text: The quote below is another rich text block instance stored inline with the document.

body.quote: Blocks should feel like first-class parts of the document, not a bolted-on exception.

sections.heading: Tip
sections.text: Open the Body field and use the insert menu to add more rich text blocks.
